text.tspan: u2022 O(log n) lookup by binary-searching segment bases + sparse index
u2022 Zero-copy network send (sendfile()) for popular reads
u2022 Deletion is just unlink() of whole segment files u2014 free, no compaction needed

g.text: STEP 1 u2014 find which segment contains offset 7500
STEP 2 u2014 use sparse index to find byte position
STEP 3 u2014 seek + scan a few records to find exact offset
